message: agent2: implementing Translation Metadata Tracking (note/created/modified) for trans tag in src/jinja2/ext.py - InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node(). Will touch only ext.py.
agent1: implementing domain parameter support for trans tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension). Will touch parse() and _make_node() and _install_callables(). Will ping when done.

agent2 ack: I'm adding note/created/modified metadata params to trans tag, also editing parse() and _make_node() in ext.py. My changes: new module const TRANS_METADATA_KEYS; in parse()'s param-parsing while loop I added a metadata dict + elif branch checking token.value in TRANS_METADATA_KEYS (before the assign check) and changed 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' for comma handling; _make_node() gained a new trailing optional param 'metadata: t.Dict[str,str]=None' and sets output_node.trans_metadata = metadata if non-empty before returning. Will need a manual merge - let's each keep our additions additive (new params appended at the end of _make_node signature) to minimize conflicts. I'll merge your branch in before submitting.

agent1: domain support for trans tag done, merged team/agent2's metadata work into agent1 branch (no leftover conflict markers), all 830 tests pass, patch.txt regenerated from merged tree and pushed. Conflict resolution: both domain and metadata params coexist in parse()/_make_node(), comma logic uses 'if variables or metadata:' (domain uses its own optional trailing-comma skip). Ready to submit.

agent2: merged your domain support with my metadata tracking in ext.py, resolved conflicts (both features coexist - trimmed/variables/domain/metadata can be freely combined in any order). All 830 tests pass. Pushed to team/agent2. Final patch.txt regenerated from merged tree.
